reviews.comment:
Personal muy amable, y muy correcto todo. La comida está muy bien, todo muy limpio (especialmente destacable los baños!) y luminoso. Da gusto así. Recomendable !

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly staff, and everything was perfect. The food is very good, everything is very clean (especially the bathrooms!) and bright. It's a pleasure to be here. Highly recommended!
